title: mentha longifolia var. subincana
intro: Mentha longifolia var. subincana, also known as woolly mint, is a variety of mint plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It is a perennial herb with a distinctive woolly texture and fragrance, often used for its medicinal and culinary properties. The medicinal properties of Mentha longifolia var. subincana include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of this plant include relieving symptoms of IBS, soothing digestive issues, and reducing inflammation, with herbal preparations such as tea, essential oil, and infusions being commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
